HelpSidebar.title: Help
HelpSidebar.exploreDescription: Explore our documentation or contact our team for assistance.

Login.title: Sign In
Login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

Register.title: Create Account
Register.description: Complete the form to sign up

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

ResetPassword.title: Reset Password
ResetPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
ResetPassword.successMessage: If {email} is registered, you'll receive a link to reset your password in the next few minutes. Check your inbox and spam folder.

errors.requestFailed: Couldn't send the link. Try again in a few minutes.

ResetPasswordToken.title: New password
ResetPasswordToken.description: Choose a new password for your account. The link expires in 1 hour.
ResetPasswordToken.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password
ResetPasswordToken.invalidLink: This link is no longer valid or has expired. Request a new one.

Unassigned.metadataDescription: Your account is not assigned to any organization.
Unassigned.title: Unassigned user
Unassigned.description: Your account is not assigned to any organization and you don't have access to the platform.
Unassigned.alert: To get access, an administrator must assign you to an organization.
Unassigned.step3: Wait until you are assigned to the corresponding organization
Unassigned.footer: Once assigned to an organization, you'll be able to access all platform features.

Invitations.alreadyAcceptedBody: The link is single-use. Sign in to access the tenant.
Invitations.expiredBody: Ask the tenant administrator to send you a new one.
Invitations.notFoundBody: We couldn't find this invitation. Verify the link or request a new one.
Invitations.existingAccountNote: You already have an account on Doxiq. By continuing, we'll add you to this tenant using your current password.

errors.acceptFailed: Couldn't accept the invitation. The link may have expired.
errors.connectionError: Couldn't accept the invitation. Try again.

Forbidden.title: You don't have permission to view this page
Forbidden.description: The role associated with your account doesn't include the necessary permissions to access this resource. If you think this is an error, contact an administrator.
Forbidden.currentRole: Your current role doesn't have access to this section of the platform.
Forbidden.step1: Verify that you're trying to access the correct section
Forbidden.step3: Request the necessary permissions to access this resource
Forbidden.footer: Once you have the necessary permissions, you'll be able to access all corresponding features.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Overview of your document processing activity

throughput.title: Throughput
throughput.description: Documents completed per month over the last year

errors.load: Couldn't load dashboard data. Try refreshing the page.

Workflows.title: Workflows
Workflows.emptyDescription: Workflows help you organize your documents and collaborate with your team.

card.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
card.duplicateDescription: Create a copy of "{name}" with all its document types, rules and pipeline.

createDialog.title: New workflow
createDialog.description: Create a new workflow for your team.
createDialog.analysisDescription: Business rule evaluation on extracted documents
createDialog.caseRecipeDescription: Multi-document case file with completeness, review and approval
createDialog.fromYamlDescription: Import a .yml file with phases, document types and rules
createDialog.yamlFileHint: Must be an exported bundle envelope (phases, types and rules).

editDialog.title: Edit workflow
editDialog.description: Update the workflow name and how its cases are labeled.
editDialog.caseNounHelp: How to name a case in this workflow. Leave blank to use the default «Case/Cases».
editDialog.caseNounError: Fill in all four forms, or leave them all empty.

overview.subtitle: Pick where to go from here.
overview.notFoundDescription: This workflow doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

cards.documents: Upload, track and manage the documents flowing through this workflow.
cards.cases: Review cases, their documents and analysis results.
cards.workflow: Configure the processing pipeline, models and rules.
cards.integrations: Connect external services and delivery channels.

Documents.title: Documents
Documents.subtitle: DOCUMENTS

empty.title: Upload Your Documents to Extract Data
empty.description: PDF, Word documents, and images accepted.
empty.willBeClassified: Documents will be intelligently classified into:

archived.title: Archived Documents
archived.description: Documents that have been archived will appear here.

rejected.title: Rejected Documents
rejected.description: Documents that have been rejected will appear here.

Documents.noResults: No documents match the current filters.

confirmed.message: These documents have been confirmed and are ready for export

Documents.deleteSetDescription: Delete "{name}"? Extracted documents are kept, but the set will disappear. This action cannot be undone.

bench.locked: The case is locked: the review is claimed by {holder}.

DocumentDataPane.emptyDescription: This document hasn't been processed yet.
DocumentDataPane.plainEmpty: No plain text available for this document.
DocumentDataPane.validationEmptyDescription: No validation rules ran, or the results aren't ready yet.

PendingInvitation.expiresInDays: Expires in {days, plural, =1 {# day} other {# days}}
PendingInvitation.expiresInHours: Expires in {hours, plural, =1 {# hour} other {# hours}}

EditMemberDialog.title: Edit member
EditMemberDialog.description: Update the user details. Changes will apply on save.
EditMemberDialog.photoHint: PNG or JPG. The photo is saved instantly.
EditMemberDialog.supportHint: Cross-tenant access used by the support team. Only visible to superusers.

InviteUserDialog.title: Invite user
InviteUserDialog.step1Description: Enter the email of the new user.
InviteUserDialog.step2Description: Select the role they will have in the team.
InviteUserDialog.step3Description: Review the details before sending the invitation.
InviteUserDialog.emailHint: The invitee will set their name and password when accepting the invitation.
InviteUserDialog.noRoles: No roles available. Create one first in the Roles section.
InviteUserDialog.invitationSummary: Will receive an email with an invitation link.

CaseDialog.newCaseDescription: Create a new case to group related documents for analysis.
CaseDialog.namePlaceholder: e.g. ACME Corp - Invoice Batch Q1

ConfirmDelete.defaultDescription: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

Cases.title: Cases
Cases.subtitle: CASES
Cases.failedRunsTooltip: A file processing run failed in this case. Open the case and check the Activity tab for the cause and to retry.
Cases.bulkDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} {nounPlural}? This action cannot be undone and associated documents will be removed.
Cases.nameNotEditable: This workflow names cases after the uploaded file; the name can't be edited.
Cases.emptyDescription: Every incoming document creates or feeds your {nounPlural}. Upload your documents here, receive them through a connected channel (email, WhatsApp), or create them via API to get started.
Cases.noResults: No results match the current filters.
Cases.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and all associated documents will be removed.

CaseDetail.title: Case detail
CaseDetail.needDocumentToReextract: Upload at least one processed document to re-extract fields
CaseDetail.waitProcessing: Wait for the current processing to finish
CaseDetail.cancelAnalysisFirst: Cancel the in-progress analysis to re-extract
CaseDetail.needDocumentToAnalyze: Upload at least one document to run the analysis

cancelDialog.title: Cancel analysis
cancelDialog.description: Do you want to cancel the in-progress analysis? In-flight evaluations will be interrupted and the run will be marked as canceled.

forceCancelDialog.title: Force cancellation
forceCancelDialog.description: The run has been in CANCELING too long. Forcing cancellation will mark it as canceled in the database and free the case to start a new analysis. If the workflow was still alive in Temporal, it will be terminated.

DoctypeFieldsTab.invalidJsonSchema: The file does not contain a valid JSON Schema (root must be type=object).
DoctypeFieldsTab.backendRejected: The backend rejected the JSON Schema
DoctypeFieldsTab.emptyDescription: Add fields to describe the data you want to extract from documents.
DoctypeFieldsTab.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this field? This action cannot be undone.

DoctypeValidationTab.emptyDescription: Ensure that data satisfies certain conditions or constraints.
DoctypeValidationTab.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this rule? This action cannot be undone.

DoctypeSettingsTab.idDescription: Copy this document type's ID for use in API requests.
DoctypeSettingsTab.slugDescription: Stable identifier auto-generated from the name. Used to reference this document type in rules and integrations.
DoctypeSettingsTab.descriptionPlaceholder: A curriculum vitae or resume document containing professional experience, education, and skills information.
DoctypeSettingsTab.descriptionHint: Improve classification by describing the document type, its distinguishing features, and any common alternate names.
DoctypeSettingsTab.keywordsHint: Distinctive terms that help identify this document type during classification.
DoctypeSettingsTab.examplesHint: Representative snippets of text typically found in this document type.
DoctypeSettingsTab.importErrorInvalidJson: The selected file is not valid JSON.
DoctypeSettingsTab.importErrorNotObject: The file must contain a document type object.
DoctypeSettingsTab.importErrorNoData: No importable fields were found in the file.
DoctypeSettingsTab.importErrorInvalidValue: The value for "{field}" in the file is invalid.
DoctypeSettingsTab.importErrorInvalidSchema: The "fields" property is not a valid JSON Schema.
DoctypeSettingsTab.importErrorCreateFailed: Could not create the document type.
DoctypeSettingsTab.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the document type.
DoctypeSettingsTab.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes "{name}" with all its fields, rules and samples. This action cannot be undone.

ImportDoctypeModal.title: Import document type
ImportDoctypeModal.description: Review the fields that will be overwritten with values from the file.
ImportDoctypeModal.descriptionCreate: A new document type will be created with the following values.
ImportDoctypeModal.warning: These fields will be replaced and cannot be recovered.
ImportDoctypeModal.errorDefault: Failed to import the document type.

ValidationRuleDetail.name: Name
ValidationRuleDetail.namePlaceholder: A short title for this rule
ValidationRuleDetail.promptPlaceholder: Describe the constraint in natural language...
ValidationRuleDetail.promptHint: Describe the constraint in natural language. Type {open} to reference a field (e.g. {example}). Queries are unable to search the web or access external services or APIs.

missingData.title: Missing Data Handling
missingData.skipDescription: If an annotation is absent, the rule is skipped and no validation result is recorded.
missingData.failDescription: If an annotation is absent, the rule is not run and a failed result is recorded.
missingData.passDescription: If an annotation is absent, the rule is not run and a passed result is recorded.
missingData.ignoreDescription: If an annotation is absent, the rule still runs, receiving None for the missing value so your own logic can decide the outcome.

SuggestFieldsModal.title: Suggest fields with AI
SuggestFieldsModal.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Purchase invoice with supplier, line items, total and VAT
SuggestFieldsModal.descriptionHint: If omitted, fields will be inferred directly from the sample document.

ConfirmReplaceDocument.title: Replace sample document
ConfirmReplaceDocument.message: Uploading a new document will clear the current {items}.

DocumentUploadArea.title: Upload a document to train your AI
DocumentUploadArea.subtitle: PDF documents accepted.
DocumentUploadArea.dragHint: Drag and drop a file from your computer, or

DoctypePreview.emptyDescription: Upload a PDF or image document to use as reference when configuring the extraction fields.

errors.schemaRejected: The backend rejected the JSON Schema
errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the document type

DocumentTypes.title: Document Types
DocumentTypes.emptyDescription: Document types define the structure and validation rules for your documents. Create your first document type to get started.
DocumentTypes.emptyDescriptionAdd: Document types define the structure and validation rules for your documents. Add one to get started.
DocumentTypes.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

AnalysisRules.title: Analysis Rules
AnalysisRules.description: Define and manage analysis rules to evaluate against extracted data.

OutputSchemaList.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this property? This action cannot be undone.

SynthesisConfig.enableLabel: Generate LLM narrative when runs close
SynthesisConfig.enableHint: When a run reaches COMPLETED, the synthesizer consolidates outputs into the declared schema.
SynthesisConfig.templateDescription: Base instruction for the synthesizer. Supports tokens {example}.
SynthesisConfig.templatePlaceholder: Consolidate the findings of run '{{run.id}}' for case '{{case.name}}'…

OutputSchemaEditor.title: Output schema
OutputSchemaEditor.description: JSON Schema that constrains the LLM's output on each synthesis.
OutputSchemaEditor.defaultActive: Default schema active. Turn off the toggle to customize it.

RunSummary.narrativePending: Narrative pending — will start once the run finishes.

AnalysisRulesContent.emptyDescription: Create rules to evaluate against the extracted data.
AnalysisRulesContent.deleteDescription: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

KnowledgeContent.uploadFailed: Failed to upload "{name}". Please try again.
KnowledgeContent.unsupportedType: "{name}" is not a supported file type. Allowed: {allowed}
KnowledgeContent.emptyDescription: Upload reference documents (PDF, XLSX, TXT, MD, PNG, JPG) to enhance extraction accuracy with RAG-powered context.
KnowledgeContent.deleteDescription: This will remove "{name}" and all of its vector embeddings. This action cannot be undone.

DataExportConfig.integrationsDescription: Set up integrations to automate your document processing workflows.
DataExportConfig.helpText: Need help setting up integrations? Contact us for support or visit our documentation for detailed guidance. We're here to ensure a smooth setup experience!
DataExportConfig.apiKeysDescription: Manage your API keys to authenticate API requests.
DataExportConfig.webhookSecretDescription: Used to sign webhook payloads so you can verify the integrity.
DataExportConfig.webhookSecretRevealOnce: Copy this secret now — it won't be shown again.
DataExportConfig.webhookUrlDescription: Where event deliveries are sent. Must be an https endpoint.
DataExportConfig.webhookEnabledDescription: Deliver events for this workflow's document processing.
DataExportConfig.saveError: Could not save. Check the URL and try again.

PreprocessingConfig.ocrDescription: Convert printed or handwritten text in scanned documents or images into readable text.

ocr.skipDescription: Never apply OCR. Use if you're only working with documents where OCR isn't needed, like text-based Word documents.
ocr.autoDescription: OCR is applied when we identify a document without a text layer.
ocr.partialDescription: Always apply OCR to only the sections of the document that need it.
ocr.fullDescription: Always apply OCR to the entire document.

PreprocessingConfig.duplicatesDescription: Automatically detect and reject duplicate documents to avoid unnecessary re-processing. Only exact matches are rejected, so if any part of the file has changed, it will be treated as a different document.
PreprocessingConfig.readingOrderDescription: Reading Order Models determine the logical reading order of text in documents. This helps ensure text is extracted in a natural, human-readable sequence.

readingOrder.defaultDescription: Use the default reading order model.
readingOrder.customDescription: Have unique requirements? Custom models are available upon request.

PreprocessingConfig.splitWordsDescription: Separates incorrectly combined words to improve text extraction accuracy when your documents are parsed.

SplittingConfig.autoSplitDescription: Uploaded files may be split into separate documents for easier management and processing.
SplittingConfig.selectSplitterDescription: Choose which splitter to use for this workflow.

splitters.customDescription: Have unique requirements? Custom splitters are available upon request.

SplittingConfig.customSplittersDescription: Custom splitters can be useful for specific use cases. Contact us for more information in creating a splitting model that suits your specific needs.

ValidationConfig.enableDescription: Allow documents and annotations to be reviewed and confirmed.
ValidationConfig.autoConfirmDescription: Automatically confirm documents if all validation rules pass.
ValidationConfig.allowFailedDescription: Allow manual confirmation of documents that have failed validation rules.
ValidationConfig.memoryDescription: Configure which human-reviewed documents are stored in the model's memory as reference examples to improve performance.

memory.autoDescription: Intelligently select which documents to store in model memory.
memory.manualDescription: Manually select which documents to store in model memory.
memory.alwaysDescription: Store all reviewed documents in model memory.

ClassificationConfig.autoDescription: Automatically classify documents into the configured document types.
ClassificationConfig.rejectDescription: Automatically reject documents that do not match any of the configured document types.
ClassificationConfig.modelDescription: Choose a classification model to use to sort documents into document types.

models.defaultDescription: LLM-powered classifier that instantly learns from documents in model memory
models.fastDescription: A lightweight fast classifier recommended for resume parsing workflows

AnalysisConfig.enableDescription: Perform cross-validation and analysis between fields across multiple document types to ensure data consistency and detect discrepancies.
AnalysisConfig.autoValidationDescription: Automatically validate and flag documents when analysis rules detect inconsistencies or conflicts between related documents.
AnalysisConfig.crossDocDescription: Compare and validate data across multiple documents to identify mismatches, duplicates, or missing information between related document types.
AnalysisConfig.rulesDescription: Analysis rules define how fields are compared and validated across document types. Configure custom rules to match your specific business logic and data validation requirements.
AnalysisConfig.docTypesDescription: Analysis is performed across all document types in this workflow. Cross-validation rules can be configured to compare specific fields between related document types.
AnalysisConfig.customRulesText: For advanced analysis configurations and custom validation rules tailored to your specific document types, contact our support team.

WhatsappUploadConfig.numberDescription: Upload documents to this workflow by sending them via WhatsApp to this number.
WhatsappUploadConfig.step1: 1. Save the WhatsApp number to your contacts
WhatsappUploadConfig.step2: 2. Send your documents as attachments in WhatsApp
WhatsappUploadConfig.step3: 3. Documents will be automatically processed and added to this workflow
WhatsappUploadConfig.allowlistDescription: Only allow messages from certain phone numbers to send documents to this workflow. If the list is empty, all messages are allowed.

errors.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
errors.alreadyInList: This phone number is already in the allowlist

EmailUploadConfig.uploadAddressDescription: Upload documents to this workflow by attaching documents in an email to this address.
EmailUploadConfig.allowlistDescription: Only allow emails from certain addresses to send documents to this workflow. If the list is empty, all emails are allowed.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.alreadyInList: This email is already in the allowlist

IntegrationsConfigForm.apiKeysDescription: Manage your API keys to authenticate API requests.
IntegrationsConfigForm.workflowIdDescription: Copy this workflow's ID for use in API requests.

ConnectionsOrg.title: Integrations
ConnectionsOrg.subtitle: Connect accounts once at the organization level. Workflows then select them as origins and destinations.
ConnectionsOrg.emptyDescription: Connect an HTTP, Slack or WhatsApp account to reuse it across workflows.

providerDescription.HTTP: Connect an HTTP API your pipelines can call mid-run.
providerDescription.SLACK: Post results to a Slack channel.
providerDescription.EMAIL: Receive and send documents over email.
providerDescription.WHATSAPP: Receive and send messages over WhatsApp.

picker.title: New integration
picker.description: Choose the type of integration you want to connect.

form.title: Connect {provider}
form.description: These credentials live at the organization level and are selected per workflow.

Connections.title: Connections
Connections.subtitle: CONNECTIONS
Connections.webhookDescription: Send a JSON payload to an HTTP endpoint on workflow events.
Connections.webhookSourceDescription: Receive documents over HTTP. Your system POSTs each file to the ingest URL and this workflow processes it.
Connections.slackDescription: Post results to a Slack channel.
Connections.emailDestinationDescription: Email results using a configurable template.
Connections.emailOriginDescription: Receive documents at a dedicated inbound address for this workflow.
Connections.whatsappDescription: Send results to a WhatsApp number.
Connections.whatsappOriginDescription: Receive documents from a dedicated WhatsApp number.
Connections.driveOriginDescription: Import documents automatically from a watched Drive folder.

WebhookDestinations.title: Webhooks
WebhookDestinations.subtitle: Send events to webhook endpoints when documents finish processing.
WebhookDestinations.emptyDescription: Add a destination to start receiving document events at your HTTP endpoint.
WebhookDestinations.deleteDescription: Delete “{name}”? Events will no longer be delivered to this endpoint.

secret.title: Signing secret
secret.description: Use this secret to verify that events come from Doxiq.

deliveries.empty: Deliveries appear here once documents finish processing and events are sent to this endpoint.

dialog.description: Send document events to an HTTP endpoint. A signing secret is generated automatically.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.urlHint: Must be a public https URL.
dialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional — what this destination is for

WorkflowIntegrations.title: Integrations

dialog.title: Add New Integration
dialog.description: Select a service to connect to your integration

WorkflowPermissions.title: Permissions
WorkflowPermissions.accessDescription: Control who can open and use this workflow
WorkflowPermissions.membersCount: {count, plural, =0 {No members} one {# member} other {# members}}
WorkflowPermissions.implicitAccessNote: You and organization owners always have access.

orgAccess.title: Everyone has access
orgAccess.description: All members of your organization can open and use this workflow. Switch to Private to limit access to specific people.

privateEmpty.title: No members added yet
privateEmpty.description: Only you and organization owners can access this private workflow. Add members so your team can collaborate.

error.title: Couldn't load permissions
error.description: Something went wrong loading this workflow's permissions.

dialog.title: Add members
dialog.description: Add people from your organization so they can collaborate in this workflow.
dialog.allAdded: Everyone in your organization is already a member.

Profile.title: My Profile
Profile.description: Manage your user profile and personal settings
Profile.dangerZoneDescription: Changing your password is a sensitive action. Make sure that's what you want to do.

Settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this organization? This action cannot be undone.

orgName.title: Organization Name
orgName.description: Choose a name for this organization.

orgId.description: Copy the unique identifier for this organization.

orgAvatar.title: Organization Avatar
orgAvatar.description: Upload an avatar for this organization.

webhookKey.title: Webhook Signature Key
webhookKey.description: Used to sign webhook payloads so you can verify their integrity.

Billing.title: Billing
Billing.description: Your credit balance will be consumed when using Doxiq's services, whether through the API or the web application. You can buy credits directly or set up auto-reload thresholds.
Billing.buyCreditsDescription: Add a valid credit card to buy credits or set up auto-reload for when your balance drops below a certain threshold.
Billing.customNeedsText: Need a custom package or enterprise pricing?
Billing.noInvoicesHint: Add a payment method and purchase credits to see your invoice history.

UsageQuotaCard.daysRemaining: {count, plural, =1 {# day remaining} other {# days remaining}}

Knowledge.emptyDescription: Knowledge bases are collections of documents used for RAG processing. Create your first knowledge base to start building your AI context.
